title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Voltas Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Voltas Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Voltas Digital Technologies is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Ranchi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Voltas Digital Technologies:
Voltas Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Voltas Digital Technologies!
